subject: WM-0180 review: changes_requested
body: Medium: quiet-host-admission.ps1:428-432 accepts finite fractional logicalProcessorCount; a PS5.1 synthetic probe with 1.5 returned admission_passed/exit 0, violating invalid-count fail-closed. Require a positive integer within Int32 bounds before casting and add fractional coverage. Medium: quiet-host-admission-self-test.ps1:126-129 TrimEnd removes unlimited CR/LF, so JSON plus extra blank stdout lines would pass the claimed exactly-one-line assertion. Validate the raw stdout framing exactly (one compact JSON record and one terminator) before parsing.
